title: ApocoBirds
description: Makes parrots look like birds from Lobotomy Corporation.
body:
A resource pack that makes parrots look like the bird Abnormalities from the hit monster management videogame Lobotomy Corporation. (Punishing Bird, Big Bird, Judgement Bird and ~~Apocalypse Bird~~)


![Parrots in a jungle that look like birds from LobCorp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bb55259c8ecfa91d9f837b47ad6dbe4a1a393bf_0.webp)

Now also featuring The Firebird from Lobotomy Corporation!

![Parrot that looks like the Firebird from Lobotomy Corporation. In the background is a jungle on fire.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f46611a405b55d38be18cb861599d30c6db1e5f_0.webp)
